subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which the Lord of Power hath sent down from His Most Great Horizon unto him who hath turned toward the Dayspring of Revelation when the Hour appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک القدر من منظره الاکبر لمن اقبل الی مشرق الوحی اذ ظهرت الساعه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings
